ItacPersonItem.Notes: Carmelitan father. The origin is taken from the following title: Scrutinium sacerdotale, sive modus examinandi, ... a R .D. Fabio Incarnato Neapolitano sac. theol. profes. ex plurib. ... Nuper recognitum à r. admodum m. Alexio Porro de Mantua, carmelitano sac. theo. doct. ... (Venetiis: [Giovanni Battista Porta], 1597)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
